scripts.deploy:worker: export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$(grep '^CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=' .env.cloudflare | cut -d= -f2-) && export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$(grep '^CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=' .env.cloudflare | cut -d= -f2-) && pnpm --filter onlydate-worker run deploy
scripts.deploy:pages: export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$(grep '^CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=' .env.cloudflare | cut -d= -f2-) && export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$(grep '^CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=' .env.cloudflare | cut -d= -f2-) && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/onlydate --project-name onlydate --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:worker && pnpm run deploy:pages
